name: Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning India Limited
summary: Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning India Limited manufactures and trades in various window and split air conditioners, chillers, refrigerators, air purifiers, and variable refrigerant flow systems in India. It offers inverter and fixed speed split, packaged, and window air conditioners; ducted and ductless air conditioners; water and air cooled screw chillers, and centrifugal chillers; space makers; and side by side and slim line refrigerators. The company also provides accessories and spare parts for its products, as well as undertakes after sales services, including repair and maintenance. It offers its products under the Hitachi brand. The company's distribution network consists of 5 regional offices, 21 branch offices, and approximately 10,000 sales points and 1,400 after sales service providing partners. It also exports its products to Nepal, Bhutan, Sri Lanka, Maldives, Indonesia, Vietnam, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain, Iraq, Kuwait, and Saudi Arabia. The company was formerly known as Hitachi Home & Life Solutions (India) Limited and changed its name to Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning India Limited in September 2016. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Kadi, India. Johnson Controls-Hitachi Air Conditioning India Limited is a subsidiary of JCHAC India Holdco Limited.
